subject: English
chapter: Verghese Kurien—I Too Had A Dream

activities_projects.title: Understanding the Life of Verghese Kurien
activities_projects.objective: Learn about the life and achievements of Verghese Kurien
steps: Read the chapter carefully
Identify key events from Verghese Kurien’s life
Write a short summary of his achievements
Share your summary with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the contributions of Verghese Kurien to India’s dairy revolution
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of summary and understanding of the chapter (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Timeline Creation
activities_projects.objective: Develop chronological understanding of important life events
steps: Read the chapter and identify important events
List the events in chronological order
Create a timeline using chart paper
Present the timeline in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to organise historical events in sequence
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and presentation of timeline (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Discussion on Dreams and Goals
activities_projects.objective: Encourage students to think about their dreams and aspirations
steps: Discuss what dreams and goals mean to you
Talk about how Verghese Kurien achieved his dream
Write about your own dream career
Share your ideas with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students reflect on personal ambitions and motivation
activities_projects.evaluation: Participation in discussion and clarity of ideas (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Traits Activity
activities_projects.objective: Identify the qualities that made Verghese Kurien successful
steps: List the qualities of Verghese Kurien mentioned in the chapter
Write examples that show these qualities
Discuss why these qualities are important for success
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn the importance of determination and leadership
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of traits with examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Role Play: The White Revolution
activities_projects.objective: Understand the significance of the White Revolution
steps: Form small groups
Assign roles such as Verghese Kurien, farmers, and cooperative leaders
Act out a scene showing how dairy cooperatives helped farmers
Perform the role play in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the impact of cooperative movements in agriculture

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Building
steps: Identify new words from the chapter
Write their meanings in your notebook
Use each word in a sentence
Share your sentences with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary and sentence construction
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct usage of words in sentences (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Group Discussion: Importance of Dairy Industry
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of the dairy industry in rural development
steps: Discuss the role of dairy farming in India
Talk about how milk cooperatives help farmers
Write your group’s ideas in your notebook
Present the discussion summary in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the economic importance of dairy farming
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of ideas and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Poster Making: White Revolution
activities_projects.objective: Visualise the concept of the White Revolution
steps: Research the White Revolution from the chapter
Design a poster showing dairy farming and milk production
Add slogans promoting cooperative farming
Display the poster in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students express ideas creatively through visual art
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and relevance of poster (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Grammar Practice: Sentence Formation
steps: Identify sentences about Verghese Kurien in the chapter
Rewrite them in your own words
Create new sentences using similar structures
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve grammar and sentence formation
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and clarity of sentences (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Reflective Writing: My Dream
activities_projects.objective: Encourage students to reflect on their personal dreams
steps: Think about your personal dream or ambition
Write a short paragraph about how you will achieve it
Explain what inspires you
Share your writing with your teacher
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop reflective and expressive writing skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity, creativity, and grammar in writing (10 marks)
